reviews.review_description:
The general game idea and the levels are nice. But the execution is flawed and you can get better puzzles in many other games.
You don't grab things or interact with puzzle items, merely touching them is enough to achieve most tasks in this game. And graphically it looks more like a GearVR/Oculus Go title.
With more content a few updates this game could become pretty good I think, but as of now I wouldn't recommend it.
